title: AX Interdictions Survived
query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Interdicted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EscapeInterdiction WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) AS escaped

details.text: {total} interdiction(s) faced with {escaped} successful escape(s) during the report period. Being pulled from hyperspace in Thargoid-controlled space is one of the game's defining moments of terror — surviving by escaping rather than submitting is a genuine test of frameshift boost and interdiction counter-manoeuvre skill.
details.help: Interdicted fires when pulled from supercruise; EscapeInterdiction when successfully broken free. total drives the title as the total times faced.

tagLines: Interdiction survival record compiled. Hyperspace extraction events and escape outcomes noted.
Something pulled you out of hyperspace. In Thargoid space, that's not a metaphor for a bad day.
The interdiction counter mechanic works. You know that because you're still here to read this.
